query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "perceptiondlm: parallel region perception with multimodal diffusion la" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational survey and criterion (f) as a canonical reference for the "multimodal reasoning" and "perception" mechanisms central to the user's query about extending a multimodal diffusion model. Although it is a survey rather than a specific implementation of the user's exact architecture, it provides the essential literature review context for the "Perception" and "Reasoning" components of the user's proposed work.
